resource.name: DirectAssigned
resource.object: 使用已分配项直接更改

resource.name: DirectAssignedStopped
resource.object: 停止时使用已分配项直接更改

resource.name: PendingAssigned
resource.object: 使用已分配项开始待定

resource.name: PendingAssignedStopped
resource.object: 停止时使用已分配项开始待定

resource.name: PoFirstDay
resource.object: 采购订单首次捕获日期

resource.name: PoLastDay
resource.object: 采购订单最后捕获日期

resource.name: OrderPoFirstDay
resource.object: 订购采购订单首次捕获日期

resource.name: OrderPoLastDay
resource.object: 订购采购订单最后捕获日期

resource.name: OrderPoDeliveryTime
resource.object: 订购采购订单发货时间

resource.name: OrderPoCatchDay
resource.object: 订购采购订单捕获日期

resource.name: NoSSCC
resource.object: 公司缺失 SSCC 信息

resource.name: CreateSSCC
resource.object: 无法创建 SSCC，前缀可能无效

resource.name: OrderNotFound
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载订单

resource.name: MaterialNotFound
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载材料

resource.name: OperationLoad
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载操作

resource.name: NotInventory
resource.object: 指定过程单元不是库存

resource.name: LoadSite
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载站点信息

resource.name: LoadCompany
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载公司信息

resource.name: HasPacks
resource.object: 由于集合有包装，所以不能执行操作

resource.name: HasStacks
resource.object: 由于集合有堆放，所以不能执行操作

resource.name: HasPallets
resource.object: 由于集合有托盘，所以不能执行操作

resource.name: HasContainers
resource.object: 由于集合有集装箱，所以不能执行操作

resource.name: NoDestination
resource.object: 目标过程单元信息缺失

resource.name: MatchContext
resource.object: 过程单元状态不允许操作

resource.name: GetRemoteObject
resource.object: 获取远程服务界面失败

resource.name: ItemRType
resource.object: 项目记录类型不允许操作

resource.name: PackRType
resource.object: 包装记录类型不允许操作

resource.name: CollectionRType
resource.object: 集合记录类型不允许操作

resource.name: CollectionUnitType
resource.object: 集合单元类型不允许操作

resource.name: OrderLoad
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载订单信息

resource.name: OrderLineLoad
resource.object: 不能从数据库中加载订单生产线信息

resource.name: OrderLineStatus
resource.object: 订单生产线状态不允许操作

resource.name: ProcessUnit
resource.object: 无法创建过程单元操作

resource.name: CustomOpInfoMissing
resource.object: 部分自定义操作信息缺失

resource.name: CustomOpXmlMissing
resource.object: 自定义操作 XML 定义缺失

resource.name: ConvertedInventory
resource.object: 已转换集合所在库存与包装库存不匹配

resource.name: ConvertedOrder
resource.object: 已转换集合所在订单与包装订单不匹配

resource.name: PoStatus
resource.object: 采购订单状态不允许操作

resource.name: InvalidPartialAmount
resource.object: 不能用指定数量修改单元

resource.name: NoPoLine
resource.object: 没有采购订单生产线符合指定产品

resource.name: HasPoLine
resource.object: 已分配采购订单生产线

resource.name: StartStockTake
resource.object: 无法开始盘点，一个可能已在使用中

resource.name: StockTakeMethod
resource.object: 库存盘点方法不允许操作

resource.name: StockTakeUnitType
resource.object: 盘点不是为这类单元建立的

resource.name: MultipleInventoryStatus
resource.object: 找到多个库存状态记录

resource.name: CodeNotFound
resource.object: 未找到有指定代码的对象

resource.name: BomNotFound
resource.object: 未在数据库中找到 BOM

resource.name: NotInBom
resource.object: 指定产品不在 BOM 中

resource.name: PrunitBom
resource.object: 该过程单元没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: LotBom
resource.object: 该批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: ProductionLotBom
resource.object: 该产品批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: PartialAdjust
resource.object: 无法调整部分包装的内容

resource.name: NoRiCountry
resource.object: 出生国家/地区信息缺失

resource.name: NoBrCountry
resource.object: 饲养国家/地区信息缺失

resource.name: StartStocktakeLocationActive
resource.object: 因为该位置正执行计算，所以不能开始库存盘点

resource.name: StartStocktakeInventoryActive
resource.object: 因为该库存正执行计算，所以该位置不能开始盘点。

resource.name: NoSupplier
resource.object: 没有采购订单或没有指定供应商的采购订单

resource.name: HasPo
resource.object: 单元已分配给采购订单

resource.name: NotInSourceBom
resource.object: 指定产品不在源 BOM 中

resource.name: NotInDestinationBom
resource.object: 指定产品不在目标 BOM 中

resource.name: SourcePrunitBom
resource.object: 该源过程单元没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: DestinationPrunitBom
resource.object: 该目标过程单元没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: SourceLotBom
resource.object: 该源批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: DestinationLotBom
resource.object: 该目标批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: SourceProductionLotBom
resource.object: 该源产品批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: DestinationProductionLotBom
resource.object: 该目标产品批次没有所需 BOM 信息

resource.name: NoInputOrderLine
resource.object: 未找到输入订单生产线

resource.name: TooManyInputOrderLines
resource.object: 找到过多输入订单生产线

resource.name: NotMatchingOrderShipment
resource.object: 装运与订单装运不匹配

resource.name: OrderMismatch
resource.object: 包装与集合订单不匹配

resource.name: POrderMismatch
resource.object: 包装与集合生产订单不匹配

resource.name: ItemCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: 要创建的项目数量高于系统允许的最大值

resource.name: PackCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: 要创建的包装数量高于系统允许的最大值

resource.name: StackCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: 要创建的堆数量高于系统允许的最大值

resource.name: PalletCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: 要创建的托盘数量高于系统允许的最大值

resource.name: LotQaMarkMismatch
resource.object: 单元 QA 分数与该批次 QA 分数不匹配

resource.name: MultipleFound
resource.object: 查找已返回的多个记录

resource.name: LoadRecord
resource.object: 无法从数据库中加载过程单元记录

resource.name: LoadCompany
resource.object: 无法从数据库中加载站点公司记录

resource.name: GetRemoteObject
resource.object: 获取远程服务界面失败

resource.name: RemoteException
resource.object: 远程对象引发的未指定异常

resource.name: RemoteFailed
resource.object: 除过程单元异常外的远程操作异常失败

resource.name: LoadLine
resource.object: 无法加载生产线子过程单元

resource.name: LotCreateRuleMia
resource.object: 未找到指定批次创建规则

resource.name: NoDefaultLotCreateRule
resource.object: 未找到默认批次创建规则

resource.name: TooManyDefaultRules
resource.object: 找到多个默认批次创建规则

resource.name: LoadProductionPlan
resource.object: 加载生产计划记录错误
